---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new chart type, palette, or configuration option
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What chart or configuration is currently impossible or awkward?

## Proposal

Describe the new chart type, palette, or option. Include a sample config and the expected output.

## Alternatives considered

Have you found a workaround with existing charts?

## References

Links to similar charts in Datawrapper, Observable, FT, Economist, etc.
